exception.message: expected [Samsung phones - Google Search] but found [https://www.google.com/search?safe=active&q=Samsung+phones&sca_esv=e44a3b63b1b18493&source=hp&ei=5B-pacnfJJmwwcsPmPWY8Aw&iflsig=AFdpzrgAAAAAaakt9AYfDdqjI5_DdP3ULcY6PiCBV80J&ved=0ahUKEwjJ4ZeXjoiTAxUZWHADHZg6Bs4Q4dUDCCg&uact=5&oq=Samsung+phones&gs_lp=Egdnd3Mtd2l6Ig5TYW1zdW5nIHBob25lc0ggUABYHnAAeACQAQCYAQCgAQCqAQC4AQPIAQD4AQGYAgCgAgCYAwCSBwCgBwCyBwC4BwDCBwDIBwCACAA&sclient=gws-wiz&sei=5R-paZzZMOShnesP9LGJ6Q0&safe=active]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [Samsung phones - Google Search] but found [https://www.google.com/search?safe=active&q=Samsung+phones&sca_esv=e44a3b63b1b18493&source=hp&ei=5B-pacnfJJmwwcsPmPWY8Aw&iflsig=AFdpzrgAAAAAaakt9AYfDdqjI5_DdP3ULcY6PiCBV80J&ved=0ahUKEwjJ4ZeXjoiTAxUZWHADHZg6Bs4Q4dUDCCg&uact=5&oq=Samsung+phones&gs_lp=Egdnd3Mtd2l6Ig5TYW1zdW5nIHBob25lc0ggUABYHnAAeACQAQCYAQCgAQCqAQC4AQPIAQD4AQGYAgCgAgCYAwCSBwCgBwCyBwC4BwDCBwDIBwCACAA&sclient=gws-wiz&sei=5R-paZzZMOShnesP9LGJ6Q0&safe=active] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1590) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:132) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:656) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:666) at stepDefinitions.GoogleSearch_stepDef.user_can_successfully_see_the_product_iphone_phones_google_search(GoogleSearch_stepDef.java:40) at ✽.user can successfully see the product "Samsung phones - Google Search"(file:///C:/Users/dsenthi1/eclipse-workspace/Cucumber_BDD/src/test/resources/features/Google_Search.feature:8)
